headline: Why American Express (AXP) Dipped More Than Broader Market Today
summary: In the closing of the recent trading day, American Express (AXP) stood at $292.27, denoting a -2.38% move from the preceding trading day.

headline: Shutdown Winner Hertz Stock  Slumps As TSA Travel Chaos Could End Soon
summary: Shares of  Hertz Global  and  Clear Secure  retreated Friday after President Donald Trump signed an executive order directing the Department of Homeland Security to pay Transportation and Security Administration employees, signaling a change in fortune for the beneficiaries of recent travel disruptions.  Just hours after the House of Representatives indicated it would reject a Senate-passed bill to fund all of DHS except U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement and U.S. Customs and Border Protection through the end of the current fiscal year, Trump mandated DHS to pay TSA agents, despite the ongoing partial shutdown.

headline: Three-Peat: Momentum Named Agency of the Year Again
summary: NEW YORK, March 27, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Global experience agency, Momentum, has been named Experiential Agency of the Year by Campaign US for the third consecutive year. Campaign US cited “While AI and tech tools captured the lion’s share of conversation and investment for much of the industry over the past year, Momentum stands out for staying laser-focused on what truly matters: the people. The global experiential agency has connected all the dots using one major tenet: ‘Everything we do
